case_title: PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO INC VS PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY-AGENT-DOUG CHO ROW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,148.80 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY-AGENT-DOUG CHO ROW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PARTY FILED BY PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO INC- AGENT JOSEPH GOODWIN.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-30-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOLLOWING THE HEARING HELD ON 4/28/2006, THE COURT DETERMINED THAT NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT PHOENI ELECTRONIC CO HAD BEEN FILED. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT & FURTHER HEARING IF NECESSARY.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-19-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-19-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 1/19/07 AT 10:00 A.M. SETTLEMENT PENDING IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY-AGENT-DOUG CHO ROW DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES AFTER SETTLEMENT PENDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
